question: What are the names and powertrain types of cars that have more than 30 total rental hours?
sql: SELECT name, Type_of_powertrain FROM Vehicles WHERE id IN (SELECT vehicles_id FROM Renting_history WHERE total_hours > 30);

filters: id IN (SELECT vehicles_id FROM Renting_history WHERE total_hours > 30)

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求查询总租赁时长超过30小时的车辆名称和动力系统类型，SQL反向翻译描述准确反映了这一意图，包括涉及的表、列和过滤条件。
